hooks.command: output=$(make pr-ready 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then printf "%s\n" "$output" >&2; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "make pr-ready failed - fix issues before committing"}}'; exit 1; fi
